title: viola riviniana var. minor
intro: Viola riviniana var. minor, also known as small field pansy or small violet, is a plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Viola riviniana var. minor include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that can help prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Viola riviniana var. minor, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
